column1: Create a file for each set you are bulk importing with te name being the set_abb.csv (example: mmq.csv).
The first line of each file should have foil or non-foil
column2: and the inventory format (As of now formats include cardsphere

column1: The second line of each file should be the collector numbers of each card separated by a decimal point. example: 95.75.16.78.116
Once you fill out a file for all sets you are bulk importing run the program and choose option 4 from the main menu. This will create a bulk output file for each entry form you filled out.
